base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of mega_man_teleport — a character (playable) from 1987 mega man. Teleport — stage-in/stage-out beam with 3-frame contraction. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
